experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Engineered distributed multi-channel B2B AI order agent (webhooks, WhatsApp, email, phone) with Claude Sonnet and RAG, owning full-stack features from design through production deployment across 7 enterprise clients and 1,000+ orders

Built Python and React internal tooling for non-technical ops stakeholders: Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 attachment store managing 250+ files

Implemented automated output-validation and human-in-the-loop QA pipeline to catch LLM failure modes; iterated on prompts and added vector-store correction memory, raising precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built Python infrastructure wrapper around Grafanalib on a 3-person team, achieving 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5) through abstraction and automation
Migrated 7+ legacy monitoring dashboards across 3 active Grafana environments with unit tests on the dashboard layer, ensuring zero-downtime deployment

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building full-stack professor review platform for 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL backend
Shipped review submission flow and built Python GraphQL webscraper for automated course data ingestion across agile sprints

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

skills.Frameworks & Libraries: React.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Flask, Spring Boot, Tailwind CSS
skills.Developer Tools: Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, Linux, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS (EC2/S3), GCP
skills.AI Tools: Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini API, LangChain, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Vector Stores, MCP

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Owned end-to-end platform engineering at internshipmatcher.com (live in production): React + TypeScript frontend, FastAPI backend, multi-tier distributed data layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), and Clerk JWT auth via JWKS

Designed dual-model Claude pipeline (Haiku 4.5 for fast skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for deep re-ranking of top 30 to top 10) at 95%+ accuracy; SSE-streamed progress events to React frontend in real time
Optimized distributed processing of 30+ positions with 52% latency reduction (270s to 130s) via dynamic batching and prompt caching

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated PSG sleep-stage scoring platform with 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy, validated against clinician-labeled hypnograms from the Sleep-EDF dataset
Engineered async distributed EEG pipeline (Redis + ARQ): parallel EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction, and Scikit-Learn classifiers per patient
Implemented sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms for QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Built and deployed autonomous lead-qualification SMS agent for Bay Area real estate client: FSM-driven pipeline with intent classification, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking of qualified leads

Integrated multi-service infrastructure: HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async Postgres with Alembic migrations and APScheduler
Live in production for client, auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach
